_sltp_note: Per-simbol SL/TP na osnovu 30-dnevnog dnevnog raspona (H-L)/mid analize (May 2026). Tier0=BTC, Tier1=niska vol 3-4.5%, Tier2=srednja 5-6%, Tier3=visoka 7%+. TP = SL × 1.5 (neutralni signal) ili SL × 3 (jak signal ≥9/13). Leverage: L=floor(1/(SL%+0.4%MMR)) → liq cijena = SL cijena. Tier0:34x Tier1:22x Tier2:16x Tier3:13x.

synapse_t.name: ULTRA — Option C: 3 gates + 7 signals (ATR per-symbol SL/TP)
synapse_t.description: Option C (23.05.2026): 3 obavezna gating (ADX≥30, RSI asimetričan, VOL_EXH tiered) + 7 neovisnih signala: E50(REV), CVD(REV), MCD, E145, SRS, SRB, RDIV. Maknuti: 6SC gate (redundantan), 5mSR gate (previše lažnih negativi), RSI signal (redundantan s gate-om), CHP (redundantan s ADX gate-om). Min 4/7 pullback, 5/7 momentum. Per-simbol SL/TP iz symbol_sltp. Tier0(BTC):SL2.5%/TP3.75%/34x | Tier1:SL4%/TP6%/22x | Tier2:SL5.5%/TP8.25%/16x | Tier3:SL7%/TP10.5%/13x. TP neutralni=1.5×SL, TP jak signal=3×SL.

risk_rules: Risk-based sizing: margin = equity × 1.5% | notional = margin × tier-based leverage iz symbol_sltp.leverage | Per-simbol SL/TP iz symbol_sltp
ULTRA tieri (May 2026 rebalans, 30-day daily range analiza):
Tier0: BTCUSDT → SL2.5% / TP3.75% / 34x / liq@2.54%=SL / RR1:1.5 (jak:1:3)
Tier1: ETH,SOL,XRP,LINK,ADA,DOGE → SL4% / TP6% / 22x / liq@4.15%=SL / RR1:1.5 (jak:1:3)
Tier2: NEAR,HYPE,SUI,SEI,APT,TAO → SL5.5% / TP8.25% / 16x / liq@5.85%=SL / RR1:1.5 (jak:1:3)
Tier3: JUP,ENA,INJ → SL7% / TP10.5% / 13x / liq@7.29%=SL / RR1:1.5 (jak:1:3)
KRITIČNO: getSafeLeverage() = floor(1/(slPct+0.4%MMR)) → liq cijena = SL cijena. SL order je primarni izlaz, likvidacija je backup na istoj cijeni. Leverage iz symbol_sltp.leverage ima prednost.
Dinamički TP (TODO): neutralni signal → TP=SL×1.5 | jak signal (Pine strength=strong) → TP=SL×3
Samo jedna pozicija po simbolu istovremeno
Max 8 otvorenih pozicija istovremeno + BTC bonus slot
Max 3 novih ulaza po scan ciklusu (sprječava 8 simultanih gubitaka u lošem marketu)
Uklonjeni simboli (loš WR): ORDIUSDT, WLDUSDT, TRUMPUSDT, AAVEUSDT, RIVERUSDT, ZECUSDT, PEPEUSDT
Uklonjeni simboli (mali volumen <10M USD/dan): ARBUSDT, WIFUSDT, TIAUSDT, FETUSDT
Uklonjeni simboli (WR 0% analiza): XAUUSDT, XAGUSDT, BNBUSDT, AVAXUSDT, DOTUSDT
